title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz Life

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz Life
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bajaj Allianz Life! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Bengaluru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bajaj Allianz Life:
Bajaj Allianz Life is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz Life!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
